text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dreams... Ya know, dreams sparkle real bright.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's what folks says, right? But my dream's not
like that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
See, mine's a bit more... urgent. We all wanna
make our families nice 'n comfy, right? Even if we
don't got the deepest pockets.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Sure is cold in here, huh, Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but if ya do this... There ya go, warm 'n
fuzzy, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We mighta been too short on cash to heat our
home, but kindness don't cost nothin'... Kindness
don't pay the bills either, though.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya wanna know why I run? Honestly, it's not
'cause I wanna make my dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's 'cause I gotta make my dream come! That's why...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer! We're signin' up for the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got the form right here. Go ahead 'n give it your
squiggle here!
choice_data_list: Y-y-y-yes, ma'am! Just don't hurt me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The hell?! Why ya actin' like I'm some kinda debt
collector?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's not prepared for it yet, Tamamo
Cross—the Umamusume I've just signed a contract
with—has been pushing hard to enter the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
See, I wanna win, and win, and win some more.
That way, the family back home can start livin'
the good life.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I've got two bolts of lightnin' for legs, and they are dyin' to hit the track! I can hardly stay put here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, ya sure 'bout that? How 'bout ya get me into
a scrimmage so I can show ya how serious I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put her down for a simple scrimmage at the
training track, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, here I go! Time to blitz down the final
stretch! Here comes my special move, White
Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Da heck?! There's nowhere for me to squeeze
through! Dammit, why do I always get stuck with
da giants?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya blockin' da way, blockheads! Outta da
waaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting totally hedged in by the bigger
racers, Tamamo Cross places dead last.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a shame, Tamtam. And after you tried
so, so hard.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't "what a shame" me! What happened back
there's criminal, I tell ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Stickin' together like mochi balls and gettin' in my
way... They were like a buncha grannies on some
kinda bargain hunt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This racer is Super Creek. She's good friends with
Tamamo Cross and has a very motherly
disposition.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how do you think we could help Tamtam
get better at running?
choice_data_list: I think she needs to loosen up a little.
I think she needs to loosen up a little.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. You want me to enjoy the race 'n all
that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But the moment I get out there, it's like I lose
control. All I can think 'bout is how I gotta win,
over 'n over again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has two hurdles ahead of her. The
first is her small body. She'll have to toughen up if
she wants to hold her own on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The second, which could also be considered a strength, is her strong desire to win. Sometimes, it can be a little too strong, giving her tunnel vision.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If I just could run better, I'd be a real bolt out there. I am White Lightning, ya know...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm s'posed to be runnin' free on that turf! Like a
bona fide thunderbolt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She knows what she wants, and if we can get her
some experience to go with her raw talent, we
should be able to make it happen. With that in
mind...
choice_data_list: Here. This is for you, Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh, what the...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, this is that form I gave ya! For the Twinkle
Series!
choice_data_list:
I've signed it, so now all we have to do is
prepare you for the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Ya know, I had my doubts, but ya really
do get me, don'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
ALL RIGHT! What're we sittin' 'round here for?!
I'm ready to give this whole thing one hundred
percent!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Right now, nobody's expectin' li'l ol' me to pack a
punch, but just you wait... Soon the whole
country's gonna be hearin' my thunder!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They certainly will! I just know you have it in you,
Tamtam. I'll be cheering you on.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's celebrate this momentous occasion with
some red bean rice. What a brave little girl you
are...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, quit treatin' me like a kid! Just cause' I'm
small doesn't mean I'm some pipsqueak...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Stop pettin' me! Just you wait till we're out on da track, Creek, 'cause—h-h-hey! Quit dat already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determined battle cry echoes across the blue
sky. The Twinkle Series is about to be struck by a
little bolt of white lightning...
